name: STM32U073 LQFP80
description: Generated from the STM32U073 alternate-function workbook and STM32U073C8 datasheet for STM32U073 LQFP80. This definition models the LQFP80 package with per-signal routing synthesized from Sheet1 package pins and Sheet2 AF0-AF15 matrix data. STM32U073 devices extend the ultra-low-power Arm Cortex-M0+ line with up to 256 Kbytes of flash memory, 40 Kbytes of SRAM, USB, and LCD support. This package definition exposes 35 peripheral blocks covering 5 timers, 3 low-power timers, 7 serial ports, 3 SPI controllers, 4 I2C controllers, 1 ADC instance, a dual-channel DAC, 1 on-chip operational amplifier, 2 ultra-low-power comparators, LCD-TFT display signals, and 1 USB interface.
